description: Reproduces the Gemini-style cascade failure: hunk 1 inserts a 30-line class but its header declares '-2,+32' while the body emits '-3,+34' (malformed). Hunks 2-5 then target lines that are shifted by ~30 from their real positions, and the duplicate-context line 'if _feedback_monitor_task:' appears 9 times in the file, triggering the 'ambiguous blocks' guard. Expected behavior: pipeline detects header/body mismatch, trusts body counts (body > header regime from change 1 of the rescue logic), rebases subsequent hunks, and applies all five changes. False-success failure mode: pipeline reports success but leaves file unchanged or in broken intermediate state.
failure_reason: Rescued by body-over-header reconciliation (change 1) in diff_parser.py: when body > header (model emitted more than declared), trust body counts so cascade offsets don't propagate.
